# Sitemap, Navigation & URL Routing

**Context**

Define the site map, navigation structure, and recommended route layout for the Next.js app to support the portal and assessment flows.

## Goals

- Produce a sitemap document and recommended Next.js path structure that aligns with the existing `app/` folder.
- Provide recommended route names for landing, onboarding, assessments, knowledge, and admin pages.

## Acceptance Criteria

- A `docs/sitemap-week1.md` is created with the route map and nav hierarchy.
- Proposed changes to `app/` folder structure (if any) are documented.

## Tasks

- [ ] Draft sitemap and primary navigation
- [ ] Propose URL structure and example Next.js routes
- [ ] Map existing pages in `app/` to sitemap entries

## Estimate

Owner role: Product/Content Architect
Estimate: 4 - 6 hours
